title: Authors and Citation
text: Zhang L, Shi J, Ouyang J, Zhang R, Tao Y, Yuan D, Lv C, Wang R, Ning B, Roberts R, Tong W, Liu Z, Shi T (2021). “X-CNV: genome-wide prediction pathogenicity copy number variations.” Genome Medicine, 13(1), 132. doi:10.1186/s13073-021-00945-4. Riggs E, Andersen E, Cherry , Martin C (2020). “Technical standards interpretation reporting constitutional copy-number variants: joint consensus recommendation American College Medical Genetics Genomics (ACMG) Clinical Genome Resource (ClinGen).” Genetics Medicine, 22, 245–257. doi:10.1038/s41436-019-0686-8.
code: @Article{,   title = {X-CNV: genome-wide prediction of the pathogenicity of copy number variations},   author = {Lu Zhang and Jing Shi and Jing Ouyang and Rui Zhang and Yan Tao and Dong Yuan and Cong Lv and Rui Wang and Bing Ning and Richard Roberts and William Tong and Zhi Liu and Tao Shi},   journal = {Genome Medicine},   year = {2021},   volume = {13},   number = {1},   pages = {132},   doi = {10.1186/s13073-021-00945-4},   pmid = {34407882}, } @Article{,   title = {Technical standards for the interpretation and reporting of constitutional copy-number variants: a joint consensus recommendation of the American College of Medical Genetics and Genomics (ACMG) and the Clinical Genome Resource (ClinGen)},   author = {Erin Rooney Riggs and Erica F Andersen and Athena M Cherry and Christa Lese Martin},   journal = {Genetics in Medicine},   year = {2020},   volume = {22},   pages = {245--257},   doi = {10.1038/s41436-019-0686-8},   pmid = {31690835}, }

title: Copy Number Variant Annotation and Transparent Scoring
text: XCNV annotates copy-number variants evaluates published X-CNV classifier without bedtools runtime XGBoost dependency. also provides separate ACMG/ClinGen 2019 lane every selected criterion remains row can inspected, changed, rescored. implementation table-oriented. DuckDB evaluates genomic overlap reciprocal-overlap joins; ordinary R owns input validation, feature reduction, portable tree evaluator, evidence scoring.

title: Copy Number Variant Annotation and Transparent Scoring
Copy Number Variant Annotation and Transparent Scoring
text: package includes compact, case-limited annotation set ClinVar allele 72461: pathogenic deletion containing SOX2. real scientific example, synthetic fixture used test suite. ClinVar publishes record assemblies. X-CNV uses GRCh37 half-open interval. source provides one assembly, lift resource staging—example Rduckhts’ rduckhts_liftover()—retain source destination coordinates beside case. following call evaluates five X-CNV annotation families bundled published model: MVP_score X-CNV model output; XCNV relabel ACMG criterion clinical class.
code: library(XCNV)  example <- xcnv_real_example() example$clinvar[, c(   "clinvar_allele_id", "clinical_significance",   "grch38_chrom", "grch38_start1", "grch38_end1",   "grch37_chrom", "grch37_start0", "grch37_end0" )] #>   clinvar_allele_id clinical_significance grch38_chrom grch38_start1 #> 1             72461            Pathogenic            3     181710887 #>   grch38_end1 grch37_chrom grch37_start0 grch37_end0 #> 1   181748657            3     181428674   181466445 prediction <- predict_cnv(example$cnv, example$resources) prediction[, c(   "Chr", "Start", "End", "Type",   "CDTS_1st", "CDTS_5th",   "gain.freq", "loss.freq",   "pLI", "Episcore", "GHIS", "MVP_score" )] #>   Chr     Start       End Type   CDTS_1st  CDTS_5th gain.freq loss.freq #> 1   3 181428674 181466445 loss 0.01032511 0.0765117         0         0 #>         pLI  Episcore      GHIS MVP_score #> 1 0.3966965 0.9209667 0.6169144 0.8537559

title: Copy Number Variant Annotation and Transparent Scoring
text: real deletion completely contains GENCODE v19 SOX2 gene ClinGen haploinsufficiency record. automatic provider derives objective content criteria can establish relations: rows can scored directly: criterion 2A supplies one point deletion completely contains established haploinsufficient gene. automatic provider invent phenotype, inheritance, segregation, population, case-report, partial-gene evidence. require explicit additional evidence rows.
code: cnv <- transform(   example$cnv,   cnv_id = example$clinvar$cnv_id,   cnv_type = type ) evidence <- derive_cnv_2019_evidence(   cnv, example$genes, example$dosage ) evidence[, c(   "criterion", "score", "source_id",   "source_release", "evidence_id" )] #>   criterion score                       source_id source_release #> 1        1A     0                         GENCODE            v19 #> 2        3A     0                         GENCODE            v19 #> 3        2A     1 ClinGen Gene Dosage Sensitivity     2026-07-03 #>               evidence_id #> 1 genes:ENSG00000181449.2 #> 2            gene-count:1 #> 3       dosage:HGNC:11195 score_cnv_2019(evidence) #>          cnv_id cnv_type score classification criterion_groups #> 1 clinvar-72461     loss     1     pathogenic                3

title: Copy Number Variant Annotation and Transparent Scoring
text: published classifier one tree 41 nodes. XCNV stores tree small, validated tabular object evaluates directly: tools/stage_xcnv_model.R rebuilds portable form original serialized booster compares evaluators 1,024 deterministic feature rows. XGBoost needed maintainer-conversion, package installation prediction.
code: model <- xcnv_bundled_model() data.frame(   trees = length(unique(model$nodes$tree_id)),   nodes = nrow(model$nodes),   features = length(model$feature_names) ) #>   trees nodes features #> 1     1    41       30  model_data <- new.env(parent = emptyenv()) data("xcnv_portable_model", package = "XCNV", envir = model_data) identical(model_data$xcnv_portable_model, model) #> [1] TRUE

title: Copy Number Variant Annotation and Transparent Scoring
text: bundled real example deliberately valid ClinVar allele 72461. general run uses full GRCh37 resource directory: xcnv_resource_manifest() lists required files. run_xcnv() provides workflow one call writes output path supplied. compatibility contract, coordinate conventions, current gaps docs/upstream-compatibility.md.
code: resources <- xcnv_resources("/path/to/xcnv-resources", require = "annotations") cnvs <- read_cnv("input.bed") predictions <- predict_cnv(cnvs, resources) write_xcnv(predictions, "predictions.output.csv")

title: Copy Number Variant Annotation and Transparent Scoring

what: Annotate CNV records with X-CNV features — annotate_cnv
title: Annotate CNV records with X-CNV features — annotate_cnv
text: Compute coding, genome-wide, regulatory, haploinsufficiency, population-frequency features used X-CNV. Overlap computed -process using BED half-open interval arithmetic; reciprocal 0.5 thresholds used upstream frequency step retained. CNV lengths use upstream inclusive end - start + 1 convention.

what: Derive objective ACMG/ClinGen 2019 CNV content evidence — derive_cnv_2019_evidence
title: Derive objective ACMG/ClinGen 2019 CNV content evidence — derive_cnv_2019_evidence
text: Derive criteria determined mechanically gene content established ClinGen dosage records: section 1 content, section 2A complete dosage-feature containment, section 3 protein-coding gene count. Case, phenotype, segregation, population, partial-gene, inheritance evidence intentionally inferred. Inputs BED half-open relations must carry source identifiers releases.

title: Derive objective ACMG/ClinGen 2019 CNV content evidence — derive_cnv_2019_evidence
code: derive_cnv_2019_evidence(   cnvs,   genes,   dosage,   functional_biotypes = "protein_coding",   established_score = 3 )

title: Derive objective ACMG/ClinGen 2019 CNV content evidence — derive_cnv_2019_evidence
text: cnvs Data frame cnv_id, chr, start, end, cnv_type ("loss" "gain"). genes Gene relation chr, start, end, gene_id, biotype, source_id, source_release. dosage ClinGen dosage relation chr, start, end, record_id, hi_score, ts_score, source_id, source_release. functional_biotypes Biotypes counted functionally important sections 1 3; defaults "protein_coding". established_score ClinGen score treated established; defaults 3.

title: Derive objective ACMG/ClinGen 2019 CNV content evidence — derive_cnv_2019_evidence
text: provenance-complete evidence data frame accepted score_cnv_2019().

title: XCNV 0.0.0.9000
text: Bundled published 41-node X-CNV classifier validated runtime-neutral R data object, made default annotation resource directory supply override. Runtime prediction remains independent XGBoost. Bundled compact real ClinVar 72461/SOX2 example case-local X-CNV annotations objective GENCODE/ClinGen content evidence. Corrected published-resource readers: LJB26 START == END records one-base points rather empty BED intervals, LJB scores selected explicit site index, headerless merged-sample file retains first observation. Added installable R package API reading CNV tables, validating resource bundles, computing X-CNV annotations, predicting MVP scores, writing legacy table format. Added small deterministic fixture tinytest coverage, including independent R overlap oracle production DuckDB inequality join. Removed bedtools XGBoost installed runtime. deterministic staging script converts separately obtained XGBoost model validated, tabular xcnv-tree-v1 artifact; package evaluates artifact R. Added independently authored ACMG/ClinGen 2019 constitutional-CNV scoring contract provenance-required evidence rows, published score ranges, criterion-group caps, five-tier classification. DuckDB-backed content provider derives sections 1, 2A, 3 explicit gene ClinGen dosage relations; case, phenotype, inheritance, partial-gene, population evidence remain curator/provider inputs. Recorded pinned upstream compatibility scope current resource limitations.
